channel.title: Adventuring Academy
channel.description: Latest releases from Adventuring Academy on Dropout.tv

item.title: Bandaid on a Bowling Ball (with Vic Michaelis)
item.description:
Vic Michaelis joins Brennan to discuss the academics of improv and when to give up control.

Duration: 1:57:10

Tags: Adventuring Academy, interviews, q and a, RPG, NPC, game masters, dungeons and dragons, role playing, tabletop rpg, brennan lee mulligan, vic michaelis
